name: SVENSKA AEROGEL HOLDING
summary: Svenska Aerogel Holding AB (publ), through its subsidiary, engages in the research, development, production, and sale of aerogel in Europe, North America, and Asia. It offers Quartzene, a non-flammable material, which is used to enhance the performance of various products and solutions, such as paint and coatings, thermal insulation, and filtration of liquids and gases. The company sells its products through direct sales channels and resellers. Svenska Aerogel Holding AB (publ) is headquartered in G√É¬§vle, Sweden.
